bias_filter.long_bias: MA20 strictly > SMA200 — bullish trend, LONG entries only
bias_filter.short_bias: MA20 strictly < SMA200 — bearish trend, SHORT entries only
bias_filter.neutral: MA20 == SMA200 — no clear trend, skip all entries
bias_filter.purpose: Trade WITH the macro trend only. Avoid counter-trend entries.

entry.long: GREEN candle close >= MA20 + prev RED + body >= 0.02% + MA20 > SMA200 (IMMEDIATELY on signal)
entry.short: RED candle close <= MA20 + prev GREEN + body >= 0.02% + MA20 < SMA200 (IMMEDIATELY on signal)
entry.order_type: MARKET — fills immediately at best available price

logic.bias_check: MA20 vs SMA200 checked first — wrong trend bias skips entry
logic.reversal_check: Previous candle opposite color (RED for LONG, GREEN for SHORT)
logic.ma20_check: Current close >= MA20 for LONG, <= MA20 for SHORT
logic.purpose: Trend-filtered reversals — high probability entries with momentum

exit.long: MA20 crossover: current close < MA20 AND previous close >= MA20 (IMMEDIATELY on signal)
exit.short: MA20 crossover: current close > MA20 AND previous close <= MA20 (IMMEDIATELY on signal)
exit.stop_loss: 3% unrealized PnL loss from entry — hard stop, checked every 10 seconds with LIVE price
exit.order_type: MARKET — fills immediately at best available price

logic.confirmation: Requires crossover between current and previous candle
logic.tracking: Logs P&L ($), win count, loss count, win ratio (%)
logic.purpose: Simple, reliable exits with profitability metrics

consolidation_filter.description: DISABLED - Allow trading during consolidation, focus on MA20 + body size
consolidation_filter.benefit: More frequent entries on reversal signals

volume_filter.description: REMOVED - Focus on MA20 + consolidation only

position_sizing.description: Risk 1% per trade, max $500 margin, 5× leverage

limits.description: Max 20 open, 500 trades/day, 1000ms delay, 3% unrealized PnL stop-loss

deployment.process: bot.js (CONSOLIDATED BOT — single process, 100% of trading)

persistence.positions.json: Open position state (direction, entryPrice, qty, openedAt) — survives restarts
persistence.trades-today.json: Daily trade counter with date — resets at midnight UTC

profitability_tracking.daily_pnl: Realized P&L per trade ($) + daily total
profitability_tracking.display_format: ✅ EXIT SYMBOL DIRECTION ±% | PnL: $X.XX | Daily: $Y.YY | W/L: N/M (R%)

debug.purpose: Log critical events only (reduces Railway log bloat)
